description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow that runs on pull requests, testing indexed_gzip unit tests across multiple Python versions and operating systems. Use a matrix strategy to test on ubuntu-latest, macos-latest, and windows-latest with Python 3.9 to 3.13, running tests with and without concatenation. For each job, set up Python, create and log a test environment, download zlib on Windows, build indexed_gzip, and run tests except on Windows with Python 3.12 or 3.13.
